Sometimes #TeamUSA gives it their all and we still come up short, but I couldn't be prouder of Megan Rapinoe and all of our amazing #USWNT soccer players.

Thank you for continuing to inspire women and girls around the world. #Olympics https://t.co/NapFUTvO4z

Californians expect water to flow when they turn on the faucet. They also expect to see bacon at the grocery store. Government mismanagement and misplaced priorities are jeopardizing both of these expectations.
Democrats: vaccine passport to buy groceries, no ID to vote.

So....  What does everyone think?  Anyone have any ideas on how this plays out with the #BadBatch as we barrel toward the the finale?  Will there be sadness, joy or something else?  All I know is I can’t wait for you all to see what our amazing crew has created.  Enjoy!
Guess we can finally say it officially!  So excited to bring you all some more stories and epic episodes with this cast and crew.  Thanks for watching! #TheBadBatch

Amid the anniversary of the 2014 ISIS genocide this week, a small moment of joy. Yazidi children play in the wind and rain at a temple in the Iraqi Kurdistan region today. ISIS tried and failed to extinguish the community. https://t.co/Nn3WycDOn2
In a rare summer rain shower in Iraqi Kurdistan, Yazidi kids play near a temple. Sheer joy. The ISIS genocide killed and enslaved thousands but didn't erase the community. https://t.co/GZxiodnTMZ

I know a lot of folks aren't paying attention to the CA recall.

But the latest polls show this is a tossup. And if the recall succeeds, we'll end up with another Trump/DeSantis type, like this anti-vaxxer, leading our state.

Ballots drop next weekend and are due by 9/14. VOTE!
Weak @milanimohsen https://t.co/xZT8OaIBnI
#NewProfilePic https://t.co/VQLciXkwkk

I want everyone to understand what the CA Supreme Court passed on:  Newsom changing your election laws overnight to 1) shorten the number of days you can vote; 2) eliminate traditional polling places; 3) eliminate the need for publicly noticed meetings with voting rights groups

It's almost here.  The finale of the 1st season of #TheBadBatch I hope you all enjoy it!  I wanted to thank our entire cast and crew for putting their heart and soul into this show.  It takes a lot, especially this past year to produce this show.
Please watch our story from FOB Andar in Ghazni Province. Once a US base, now under the control of the Taliban. What it means for America’s legacy and Afghanistan’s future https://t.co/KiG5ztG6c8
Putin gets a pipeline, working Americans get $4 gas.

If you kicked off your anti-recall campaign in San Francisco where all of your failures (housing, homelessness, high cost of living, gentrification, etc.) are on full display.... you might need to be recalled.

With recall ballots on the way, I've been asked by many supporters how they should vote on Question 2 (which candidate should replace Gov. Newsom if he is recalled).

The official position of the Newsom campaign is to vote NO on Question 1 and to leave Question 2 blank.

“I am in big shock... How can it be possible for me as a woman who has worked so hard and tried to learn and advance, to now have to hide myself and stay at home?”

Afghan women fear return to 'dark days' amid Taliban sweep. By @zkaram and @ahseir. 

https://t.co/47E0edmG8P

Biden administration spent 6 months flying LGBTQ flags at embassies, hiring diversity officers & lecturing us on our sins.

Now, Taliban flags flying in Kabul & Afghan women & kids will be enslaved by medieval tyrants.

Virtue signaling doesn’t defeat evil. Only brave people can.

On top of the catastrophe that is befalling 38 million Afghans, there are American and other western citizens with no clear way out of Afghanistan right now.  The failure by U.S. leaders to plan to avert this disaster is simply astonishing.
On the streets of Kabul today- feel we are witnessing history https://t.co/wcVKzbT6oJ
Great she is there. Unfortunate the editor didn't notice that when she says they are chanting 'death to America' they are actually chanting is 'God is greater'.

I am getting lots of inquiries from people in Afghanistan or people who know those trying to get to safety. I am compiling names to try and push for evacuation. I cannot promise anything but will do everything I can. Email RepKimEvac@mail.house.gov
Here are more resources: THREAD

This meme is inaccurate. The top photo is inside a private compound. The bottom is on the streets of Taliban held Kabul. I always wore a head scarf on the street in Kabul previously, though not w/ hair fully covered and abbaya. So there is a difference but not quite this stark. https://t.co/BmIRFFSdSE
Excited to finally have my graduation :) https://t.co/1050ZqNpjh
Who is responsible for billions of dollars worth of American military equipment simply being left behind in Afghanistan?
Courage

With hundreds rushing the tarmac of Kabul's international airport desperate to flee the return of the Taliban, a young Afghan woman stood in limbo between two worlds. 

“I didn’t deserve this. No one deserves this,” she told me.

https://t.co/Ogwl6zeHQZ

.@JoeBiden and .@VP have no idea what they are doing. 
#gapol #BidenLied #bringback45 #EightMonthsInIrony https://t.co/LoQulaMHGs
In awe of these women.

This photo of 600+ Afghans squeezed into a C-17 is so powerful; take a moment to put yourself in their shoes. No luggage. May never see their home country again. They risk it all for freedom. Let America be a nation that welcomes them. Feeds them. Clothes them. THREAD https://t.co/3R94QfEAY4

Our story from the madness outside Kabul airport where we witnessed Taliban fighters whipping people, shooting into the crowd and amazing producer @BrentSwailsCNN had a very close call https://t.co/YJZKCdCFAa

The Governor's mandatory water restrictions and new COVID rules for large events are (ironically?) kicking in after September 14th. What else am I missing? Possible school closures? Mandatory energy restrictions or black outs?

Soldiers by the runway at Kabul airport tell me that there are 10,000 people here processed and ready to go… but nowhere to fly them to because Qatar is refusing to accept more Afghans because they’ve reached capacity. “It’s abysmal… someone needs to step up.”

.@mtgreenee should be ashamed of herself.

I’ve been contacted by several pieces of sh*t, some even in my own family.

They are all deeply offended to be compared to Joe Biden.

#gapol https://t.co/tQNavfxFXX

Afghan evacuees try to sleep on the gravel with C17’s in the background. It’s a chilly night and incredibly loud, especially after 14 hours. One Afghan acquaintance tells me “it’s an insult to human dignity… I don’t know why the Americans are doing this.” Photo @BrentSwailsCNN https://t.co/iqXl1nFkiY

The fourth bird we were supposed to get on just got pulled. Going to be a long night here, especially for those we are talking to who have been here since yesterday evening. A woman just asked me for a blanket so I gave her my scarf.
Response from Qatar- emphatic that evacuations will continue.
On our flight and getting ready for takeoff https://t.co/bGaYREsbxT
Check out my friend .@JohnMStubbins and his livestream of President #Trump tomorrow!!!

Just landed in Doha with the team and nearly 300 Afghan evacuees. Huge thanks to all of you for your support and concern, to the US Air Force for flying us out and to Qatar for welcoming us. We are the lucky ones.

I witnessed several moments like this at Kabul airport. A female soldier carrying a weeping Afghan toddler. A Marine supporting an elderly man as he struggled to walk. Servicemen rushing a dehydrated newborn to get medical attention. So many working so hard.

Based on my anecdotal personal experience, I’m extremely sorry to say that Afghans who are on a US evacuee list have a very, very slim chance of getting into the airfield. Evacuees who are working with other nations such as UK, FR, GE, or others have a far better chance.

The scene at Kabul airport several hours ago per source from an NGO who is trying to get people out. Main problem is that it's impossible to pass the gates and get to the planes even if you are on an evacuees list https://t.co/b3bZn5B34Z

@ischinger @peterbakernyt By those who abandoned Ukraine for a little cheap gas?  

Spare me.

Can anyone recommend information resources for Afghans looking to get out? I am getting a slew of messages every day from people who have relatives in the US, who worked for the US or the UN and I am unable to answer their questions about what the best process is for them. Thanks
.@RepAndyBarr, @LeaderMcConnell, and Senator @RandPaul Push for Federal Flood Assistance to Nicholas County: https://t.co/3FV0Zp7oPZ

The majority of Afghans at the airport are not the ones we are trying to get out - allies & SIV holders.

The Taliban is flooding the zone with Afghans they know cannot get on flights to overwhelm the U.S., & intimidating Afghan allies not to try.

This is by design.

לכל מי שחושב שערוץ 20 זאת הבעיה מציעה שתסתכלו על התגובות והפרצופים הצוחקים לכתבות על המוות הטראגי של ח״כ סעיד אלחרומי ב בערוצים יותר ״מיינסטרים״ כמו כאן 11 וערוץ 12 בפייסבוק. הבעיה היותר רצינית זה שיש לפרופגנדה הזאת של ערבים=מחבלים היענות בציבור היהודי-ישראלי.

This is the government the founders warned us about.
Horror doesn’t begin to describe it.

I'm old enough to remember when Bush43 promised our presence in Afghanistan would last a short time.

...which means I'm also old enough to remember when Trump surrendered to the Taliban last year.

...and I distinctly remember FoxNews cheerleading both of these events.
So what were we doing in #afghanistan - with no combat casualties over the last year? We were keeping this from happening.

It seems anomalous for the President to focus on mourning deaths that were caused by his own amoral and irresponsible decisions — decisions that were entirely unnecessary, and executed with historic incompetence.

He cried (for Beau that is), stumble read, threw his generals under the bus; incoherently defended the Taliban, defended leaving Afghans and Americans behind, laughed, got mad, and blamed his predecessor.

That's what POTUS did today.

The narrative that ISIS is hardcore while the Taliban is pragmatic is flat out bonkers, reflecting a total lack of understanding of the landscape. Both organizations are jihadist. Both embrace violence and seek America’s destruction. Both are American enemies.

Talking to a woman, a US citizen, who worked as a translator for the US for more than ten years, who was not able to get into the Kabul airport yet again today. She will try again tomorrow but is completely terrified.
So. Much. Heartache.
117,000 people evacuated out of  Afghanistan by our government, but only 5,400 of those are Americans.

Such a disingenuous statement by @JakeSullivan46. US mil leaders were given an absurd countrywide troop cap of 600 to 700 troops by @POTUS and then had to say, well, we can’t hold both Bagram and Kabul airport with that, so we guess we’ll have to focus only on Kabul.

To the Afghan, Syrian, Lebanese, Iraqi, and Iranian people:  the world looks dark now, but this is not the end. What you are seeing from the US right now is not the real America, and it’s not what Americans want for us or for our friends. A change will come.
💙💙💙A Very Special Announcement💙💙💙 https://t.co/hCB9KJminK

Good to be back in Baghdad after almost two years.  

#Iraq https://t.co/yfzoM1PZEN

Iraq, you're next.

Get ready.

If you are wondering why prominent retired generals are not criticizing Biden, Austin, and Milley directly - it's because they would lose their board positions and soft-landings in corporate and tech America.

Some rare good news. I interviewed @FawziaKoofi77 while she was under house arrest in Kabul with Taliban guards outside her door. She was a picture of courage and composure. Today she’s reunited with her daughter, thanks to the efforts of Qatar and many others.

Taliban source tells CNN they’re concerned ISIS K fighters have “been melted” with the Taliban in Kabul and it’s very challenging to distinguish them from legitimate Taliban fighters. This makes securing the capital a challenge.

Somewhere between 200 and 9000 Americans remain in Afghanistan.

The 200 number is the one preferred by the White House.

The 9000 comes from what the White House said 9 days ago "Somewhere between 10 and 15k Americans remain"

6000 Americans were evacuated.

200 number is BS.
I suppose if you can make it to the White House having been consistently wrong about everything, there’s no reason to believe you’ve screwed up.
Are we bogged down in Germany? Italy? Spain? South Korea? Japan? Then what the hell are you talking about @JoeBiden?
Former Amb. Ryan Crocker joined me and  @marcthiessen for our podcast — up tomorrow. But one word he used to describe Biden administration policy comes back to me again and again. “Contemptible."
